prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the technical engineering spec sheet into a clean studio product hero render of the same jellyfish-shaped kitchen utensil holder. Keep the overall product design, translucent blue dome cap, silver base, and the same 4 hanging utensils: 1 slotted spatula, 1 pasta server, and 2 spoons. Remove all blueprint elements, including the exploded view, dimension lines, labels, tables, notes, and title block. Show only the assembled product centered in frame, front-facing, isolated against a minimal light gray background with a white surface, soft diffused lighting, subtle realistic shadows, and glossy premium materials. Make it look like a contemporary industrial design catalog or e-commerce product photograph.
